replies.msg: 棍

I’ve been to Tibet before. It’s famous for its breathtaking scenery at high altitude. It is a good bet that the Yuan will continue falling so you might as well go to Tibet for the summer holiday. If you might have altitude sickness such as dizziness, headaches and trouble sleeping I suggest bring some medicine along. It’s a glamorous holiday destination. In fact my friend who’s just been to the Mount Everest base camp ⛺️ sent me his photos taken here by which I was awestruck. A tour of Mount Everest would be a once in a lifetime experience. I would say it’s also the best place for stargazing because it’s much closer to the heavens than any other places on earth 🌎 It has some of the highest lakes in the world which are rich with fish 🐡🐠🐟and other marine life🐬🐳🐋🦈🦑🦐🦀🦞and the surrounding countrysides are inhabited by flocks of yellow ducks 🦆as well as wild horses 🐎 and donkeys. The lakes there such as Lake Paiku which is four thousand five hundred and ninety two metres above sea level reflects the beauty of the stars ⭐️ giving a double view of the sky at night. You can set up camp there to get the best view of the stars and galaxies 🌌 Again, going to Tibet for vacation this year is a fair bet as the Yuan has fallen a little bit over the past month.

Day1 拉萨-刚巴拉山口-观景台--羊湖营地露营（宿帐篷）
Day2 羊湖-浪卡子县-卡若拉冰川-江孜县-康马县-40冰川-达日村民宿
Day3 达日村民宿--康马县-帕里草原（帕里镇）-东嘎寺--亚东县
Day4 亚东县--江孜--日喀则
Day5 日喀则-拉孜县
Day6 拉孜-定日协格尔镇-珠峰大本营（住绒布寺）
Day7 绒布寺-定日-日喀则
Day8 日喀则-雅鲁藏布江河谷-尼木县-羊八井镇-当雄县
Day9 当雄县-藏北草原-纳木错（扎西半岛）
Day10 纳木错-圣象天门观景区
Day11 圣象天门-拉薩

仲差兩個！！
8月5 拉薩出發
有興趣可以tg我
